dashboard.label: AI RBA - Lookup Health
dashboard.description: Monitor lookup file freshness, domain coverage, process coverage, and staleness alerts for AI RBA detection lookups.

search.query: | rest /services/data/lookup-table-files splunk_server=local | where match(title, "^ai_") | eval size_kb=round(eai:data.size/1024, 1) | eval updated=strftime(strptime(updated, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval age_days=round((now() - strptime(updated, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")) / 86400, 0) | eval staleness=case(age_days>90, "STALE", age_days>30, "Aging", true(), "Fresh") | table title, updated, age_days, size_kb, staleness | rename title as "Lookup File", updated as "Last Updated", age_days as "Age (Days)", size_kb as "Size (KB)", staleness as "Status" | sort - age_days

| inputlookup ai_provider_domains.csv | stats dc(domain) as lookup_domains values(provider) as providers | appendcols [ | tstats dc(Web.url_domain) as traffic_domains from datamodel=Web where Web.url_domain=* by Web.url_domain | rename Web.url_domain as domain | lookup ai_provider_domains domain OUTPUTNEW provider | stats dc(domain) as traffic_domains dc(eval(if(isnotnull(provider), domain, null()))) as matched_domains ] | eval coverage_pct=round(matched_domains/traffic_domains*100, 1)."%" | eval unmatched=traffic_domains - matched_domains | table lookup_domains, traffic_domains, matched_domains, unmatched, coverage_pct | rename lookup_domains as "Domains in Lookup", traffic_domains as "Domains in Traffic", matched_domains as "Matched Domains", unmatched as "Unmatched Domains", coverage_pct as "Coverage %"

panel.title: Domains in Traffic Not in Lookup

search.query: | tstats count from datamodel=Web where Web.url_domain=* by Web.url_domain | rename Web.url_domain as domain | lookup ai_provider_domains domain OUTPUTNEW provider | where isnull(provider) | where match(domain, "(?i)(ai|gpt|llm|copilot|claude|openai|anthropic|gemini|bard|mistral|deepseek|groq|cohere|replicate|hugging)") | sort - count | head 20 | rename domain as "Domain", count as "Request Count"

panel.title: Process Coverage: Lookup vs Endpoint Events

search.query: | inputlookup ai_tool_processes.csv | stats dc(process_name_lc) as lookup_processes values(tool) as tools | appendcols [ | tstats dc(Processes.process_name) as endpoint_processes from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name=* by Processes.process_name | rename Processes.process_name as process_name | eval process_name_lc=lower(process_name) | lookup ai_tool_processes process_name_lc OUTPUTNEW tool | stats dc(process_name) as endpoint_processes dc(eval(if(isnotnull(tool), process_name, null()))) as matched_processes ] | eval coverage_pct=round(matched_processes/endpoint_processes*100, 1)."%" | eval unmatched=endpoint_processes - matched_processes | table lookup_processes, endpoint_processes, matched_processes, unmatched, coverage_pct | rename lookup_processes as "Processes in Lookup", endpoint_processes as "Processes in Events", matched_processes as "Matched", unmatched as "Unmatched", coverage_pct as "Coverage %"

| tstats count from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name=* by Processes.process_name | rename Processes.process_name as process_name | eval process_name_lc=lower(process_name) | lookup ai_tool_processes process_name_lc OUTPUTNEW tool | where isnull(tool) | where match(process_name, "(?i)(ai|gpt|llm|copilot|claude|openai|gemini|codex|cursor|windsurf|ollama|lmstudio)") | sort - count | head 20 | rename process_name as "Process Name", count as "Execution Count"

| rest /services/data/lookup-table-files splunk_server=local | where match(title, "^ai_") | eval updated_epoch=strptime(updated, "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") | eval age_days=round((now() - updated_epoch) / 86400, 0) | where age_days > 30 | eval severity=case(age_days>90, "Critical", age_days>60, "Warning", age_days>30, "Info") | eval recommendation=case( age_days>90, "Immediate update required - lookup data may be outdated", age_days>60, "Schedule update soon - approaching staleness threshold", age_days>30, "Monitor - lookup has not been updated recently" ) | table title, age_days, severity, recommendation | rename title as "Lookup File", age_days as "Age (Days)", severity as "Severity", recommendation as "Recommendation" | sort - age_days
